public_reputation: Recognized as a covert intelligence expert of regional weight.
appearance: A mysterious elf with piercing amber eyes, clad in a simple yet elegant cloak adorned with faint sigils.
manner: Reads as a functional local operator shaped by place, duty, and the practical customs around them. In Shelk, that reads as someone polished, socially alert, and attentive to harmony, status, and cultural presentation, and the habits of a covert intelligence expert still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of covert intelligence expert in and around House of Shelk Estate, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep House of Shelk Estate workable through the obligations of covert intelligence expert while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Shelk.
hidden_pressure: Must stay useful at the seam where policy becomes ordinary consequence. Around House of Shelk Estate, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of covert intelligence expert visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Getting involved with Lady Rosalind Shelk can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.
Lady Rosalind Shelk can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.
Lady Rosalind Shelk needs help with a problem in House of Shelk Estate that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

support_scope_notes: Appearance expanded from direct canon support in PSC_Shelkopolis. Manner and pressure remain conservative operational inference anchored to her intelligence role.
public_signal: Lady Rosalind Shelk carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: House of Shelk Estate: the part of House of Shelk Estate where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
